text.home_sub: Machine Learning, Web Dev, And Networking
text.home:
I'm a Computer Science graduate with multiple internships, and currently working full time at Clearsky AI. I am focusing on ML, software development (Web/Android), and am particularly interested in computer vision, process mining, and computational mathematics. I also like network engineering and cybersecurity too.

Successfully completed my bachelor's degree in computing, with distinction and specialization in Artificial Intelligence, and a computer vision related thesis.

projects.title: Inverted 360 camera mosaic using openCV
projects.description: My undergrad thesis capstone project to record 16 view-points of the same object.

projects.title: Natural language to SQL queries
projects.description: FastAPI service for converting natural language SQL queries. Built with LlamaIndex + Azure OpenAI

projects.title: Network Traffic Prediction
projects.description: Accurately predict types of internet traffic using recurrent neural networks and Bayes Nets

projects.title: No Fuss Calendar
projects.description: An Android Calendar app that requires no online account for sync, simply using an offline file for storage instead

projects.title: Smart TV Alternative
projects.description: Alternative software for your smart TV, enabling control from your phone's browser

projects.title: Recipe Sanitizer
projects.description: Cleanly format and downloading online recipes for offline storage and dodging all the ads/other annoying nonsense
